g.text: Step 1 — Raw source text enters the Lexer
Step 2 — DFA matches patterns per token type
Step 3 — Tokens emitted one by one
Step 4 — Token stream feeds the Parser
Key Insight — Lexer is O(n), single-pass, context-free
Time Complexity | O(n) — one pass over source
Space Complexity | O(k) — k = max token length
Context | NONE — no lookahead beyond 1-2 chars
State | Simple DFA — not pushdown automaton

text.tspan: Python INDENT is a real token type
